message:
test(workflows): add 14 unit tests for HandleSwarmLearningIndex handler (ft-2l9kn)

Tests cover metadata, event filtering, trigger types, supported agents,
cooldown configuration, and workspace extraction from pane records
(local paths, file:// URIs, remote panes, empty/missing cwd).

Build: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-tansummit-target --no-default-features
All 14 tests pass (0.01s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
